entities.name: Sri Trang Agro-Industry Public Company Limited

financial.note: Dual-listed on SET and SGX; cross-border arbitrage and regional liquidity flows impact share price volatility.

supply_chain.note: STA is a fully integrated producer; STGT consumes concentrated latex from STA. 2026 recovery in glove demand supports STA's midstream volume.
Primary buyers of TSR and RSS grades; 2026 tire stockpiling for the automotive sector is a key revenue driver.
STA procures raw material from local farmers; 2026 neutral weather conditions (post-La Niña) are expected to increase farm output.

equity_cross_holdings.entity: Sri Trang Rubber Vietnam Co., Ltd.

competitors.note: Direct competition in the concentrated latex market for medical and industrial applications.
Global rival in natural rubber processing and supply chain management.

macro_commodity_factors.logic: Benchmark pricing for TSR20 and RSS3; 2026 supply tightness is expected to support price levels.
Export-oriented business; a weak Baht (trading ~32.50 in April 2026) enhances competitiveness and translation gains.
China is the largest consumer of natural rubber; 2026 recovery in Chinese automotive production directly boosts STA's export orders.
Recent 2026 disruptions in the Strait of Hormuz increase freight costs and lead times for European and Middle Eastern exports.
